meaning: 皮西亚斯(公元前三世纪的古希腊航海家、地理学家)
examples: The Phoenician explorer Pytheas sailed along the British coast in about 250BC and "mentioned a place called Orca where there were waves of immense size", said the website.
The U.S. has also got in on the act, naming its air base in northern Greenland Thule, though no one has ever suggested that Pytheas made it that far west.
